reviews.comment:
Me parece un robo que habiendo llenado el tanque de nafta me cobren 120 pesos por 1 termo de agua caliente. Los baños sucios y hay que estar pidiendo la llave en el mini y por ende volver a devolverla. Tienen terror de que alguien que no gasto plata les use el baño. Te preguntan 3 veces si cargaste combustible para darte la bendita llave. No han echo una ampliación o modernización de nada en los últimos 25 años

(Translated by Google)
I think it's a rip-off that they charge me 120 pesos for a thermos of hot water after I've filled up the gas tank. The bathrooms are filthy, and you have to keep asking for the key at the station and then returning it. They're terrified of someone who hasn't spent any money using the bathroom. They ask you three times if you've filled up before they give you the blessed key. They haven't done any expansion or modernization of anything in the last 25 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX01xMXNBRRAB
